policy: Rename user-facing product prose and command examples; preserve only reviewed upstream, compatibility, and internal-contract references.

allowlist.pattern: official[- ]Hermes|Hermes → Simplicio Agent|Hermes Agent foundation|Hermes-derived|Hermes remains the origin|NousResearch/hermes-agent|--upstream.*hermes-agent|Hermes Agent contributors|hermes-to-simplicio-transformation|Hermes evolving|deprecated compatibility alias|remains available temporarily for compatibility
allowlist.reason: Upstream attribution/comparison, the transformation asset, or the deprecated CLI compatibility alias.
Frozen state paths, schema/module/toolset identifiers, upstream documentation URL, or explicitly labeled compatibility wrapper.
Frozen state paths and schema/toolset identifiers required by the current compatibility contract.
Frozen environment-variable name for the state-directory compatibility contract.
